$comment: Reef config. Copy to .reef/config.json (or point REEF_CONFIG_FILE at it). All keys optional; a missing/invalid file falls back to defaults. Secrets are NEVER stored here — a provider names the env var its key comes from (apiKeyEnv). Env vars override any single key (REEF_MODEL, REEF_POLICY_FILE). Use a provider via its `provider/model` id, e.g. defaultModel: zai-coding/glm-4.6.
$comment_approval: Proactive runs (triggers/heartbeat) have no human watching. proactiveApproval 'deny' (default) auto-denies a gated tool and continues; 'route' instead suspends and notifies the surfaces below so you can approve in your reef UI, auto-denying after proactiveApprovalTimeoutSeconds (default 3600) if unanswered.

surfaces.$comment: Slack/Discord/ntfy/custom incoming webhook. Put a secret URL in an env var via urlEnv instead of url.

providers.$comment: Z.ai general API (OpenAI-compatible). Models: glm-4.6, glm-4.7, glm-5.1. Set ZAI_API_KEY. e.g. zai/glm-4.6
Z.ai GLM Coding Plan — a SEPARATE, coding-only endpoint (OpenAI-compatible). Set ZAI_API_KEY. e.g. zai-coding/glm-4.6

OpenCode Go (subscription gateway), OpenAI-compatible models. Models: glm-5.1, glm-5, kimi-k2.5, kimi-k2.6, deepseek-v4-pro, deepseek-v4-flash, mimo-v2.5, mimo-v2.5-pro. Key from opencode.ai/auth via OPENCODE_API_KEY. e.g. opencode/glm-5.1

OpenCode Go — same gateway, its Anthropic-compatible models. Models: minimax-m3, minimax-m2.7, minimax-m2.5, qwen3.7-max, qwen3.7-plus, qwen3.6-plus. Same OPENCODE_API_KEY. auth:bearer because the gateway wants Authorization: Bearer, not Anthropic's x-api-key. e.g. opencode-anthropic/minimax-m3
